title: Implement feeding plans for intensive livestock production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement feeding plans for intensive livestock production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for feeding

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Assess and record livestock welfare and condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and record livestock welfare and condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and record livestock welfare and condition.

pcs.text: Identify livestock production status or stage of production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify livestock production status or stage of production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify livestock production status or stage of production.

pcs.text: Identify the environmental implications associated with intensive livestock production work, and assess and control appropriately
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the environmental implications associated with intensive livestock production work, and assess and control appropriately?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the environmental implications associated with intensive livestock production work, and assess and control appropriately.

pcs.text: Check and maintain feed distribution system and feeders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and maintain feed distribution system and feeders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and maintain feed distribution system and feeders.

pcs.text: Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for feeding

elements.title: Carry out feeding and watering

pcs.text: Check automatic and computerised feeders for blockages and correct functioning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check automatic and computerised feeders for blockages and correct functioning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check automatic and computerised feeders for blockages and correct functioning.

pcs.text: Rectify abnormalities or irregularities with feed stocks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Rectify abnormalities or irregularities with feed stocks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Rectify abnormalities or irregularities with feed stocks.

pcs.text: Monitor feed consumption and wastage and make adjustments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor feed consumption and wastage and make adjustments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor feed consumption and wastage and make adjustments.

pcs.text: Feed and water livestock as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Feed and water livestock as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Feed and water livestock as required.

pcs.text: Adjust watering systems for height or position
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust watering systems for height or position?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust watering systems for height or position.

pcs.text: Check water flow and make appropriate adjustments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check water flow and make appropriate adjustments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check water flow and make appropriate adjustments.

pcs.text: Empty watering containers or lines and clean where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Empty watering containers or lines and clean where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Empty watering containers or lines and clean where necessary.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out feeding and watering

elements.title: Conduct hygiene and administration activities

pcs.text: Dispose of waste according to environmental practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of waste according to environmental practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of waste according to environmental practices.

pcs.text: Clean and maintain feeding equipment using appropriate hygiene procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain feeding equipment using appropriate hygiene procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain feeding equipment using appropriate hygiene procedures.

pcs.text: Complete and maintain records and documentation, and report work activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete and maintain records and documentation, and report work activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete and maintain records and documentation, and report work activities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Conduct hygiene and administration activities

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
